ddls:
CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the clustering algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the algorithm */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the algorithm was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the algorithm was last updated */,
  "algorithm_type" TEXT /* Type of clustering algorithm */,
  "implementation_language" TEXT /* Programming language used to implement the algorithm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who uploaded the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was uploaded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was last updated */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data in the dataset */,
  "data_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cluster_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm used in the configuration */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used in the configuration */,
  "num_clusters" INTEGER /* Number of clusters */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Additional parameters for the algorithm */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was last updated */,
  "configuration_name" TEXT /* Descriptive name for the configuration */,
  "configuration_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cluster_configurations_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cluster_configurations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration for which the metrics are recorded */,
  "dunn_index" REAL /* Dunn’s Index */,
  "db_index" REAL /* DB Index */,
  "jaccard_index" REAL /* Jaccard Index */,
  "rand_index" REAL /* Rand Index */,
  "fowlkes_mallows_index" REAL /* Fowlkes-Mallows Index */,
  "silhouette_index" REAL /* Silhouette Index */,
  "sse" REAL /* Sum of Squared Errors (SSE) */,
  "execution_time" INTEGER /* Execution Time in seconds */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance metrics were recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance metrics were last updated */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES cluster_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing the permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  "action" TEXT /* Brief description of the action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm version */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog or notes about the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the algorithm version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the algorithm version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the algorithm version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_versions_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog or notes about the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who uploaded the dataset version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset version was uploaded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration version */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog or notes about the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the configuration version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_versions_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES cluster_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metric_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric version */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog or notes about the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance metric version was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance metric version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metric_versions_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "num_clusters" INTEGER /* Number of clusters */,
  "dunn_index" REAL /* Dunn’s Index */,
  "db_index" REAL /* DB Index */,
  "jaccard_index" REAL /* Jaccard Index */,
  "rand_index" REAL /* Rand Index */,
  "fowlkes_mallows_index" REAL /* Fowlkes-Mallows Index */,
  "silhouette_index" REAL /* Silhouette Index */,
  "sse" REAL /* Sum of Squared Errors (SSE) */,
  "execution_time" INTEGER /* Execution Time in seconds */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the performance entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_performance_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_performance_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "preference_name" TEXT /* Name of the preference */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user preference was set */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user preference was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was last updated */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
